---
name: Template Submission
about: Submit a new document template, reviewer, or framework
title: "[Template] "
labels: template
assignees: ''
---

**Template name:**
e.g., "Architecture Decision Record (ADR)"

**Type:**
- [ ] Document template (`.cursor/rules/`)
- [ ] Reviewer persona (`.cursor/rules/reviewers/`)
- [ ] Framework (`frameworks/`)

**Description:**
What does this template generate? When should a PM use it?

**Template content:**
Paste your `.mdc` file content or link to a branch.

**Tested in Cursor?**
- [ ] Yes — works as expected
- [ ] Partially — needs refinement
- [ ] No — concept only
